addressedFeedback.finding: The TypeScript native executor still exposed resolved input through RIELA_RESOLVED_INPUT_PATH and a /riela-input container request-file mount.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Removed worker-visible env/file handoff, stripped reserved legacy env names, delivered resolved input through stdin JSONL, and added command/container regression coverage.

addressedFeedback.finding: Strict stdout JSONL validation exposed example command scripts that still wrote pretty-printed multi-line JSON.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Updated affected example command scripts to emit exactly one stdout JSONL object and verified chat-agent trio parity plus full Bun tests.

lastPlanningNode: manual design-plan-impl-review continuation after prior workflow stall
residualRisks: Container execution is verified with deterministic fake runner argument coverage; live docker/podman availability remains environment-dependent.
The executor uses internal runtime-owned temporary files to connect stdin/stdout/stderr safely, but those paths are not exposed to workers as environment variables, arguments, or container mounts.
verificationCommands: bun run packages/riela/src/bin.ts workflow validate codex-design-and-implement-review-loop --scope project
bun run packages/riela/src/bin.ts workflow run native-stdio-smoke --workflow-definition-dir /tmp/riela-native-stdio-smoke.* --variables '{"name":"riela"}' --output json

rg -n "RIELA_RESOLVED_INPUT_PATH|/riela-input|resolved-input/native-request\.json|native-request" packages/riela-addons/src/native-node-executor packages/riela/src/workflow examples README.md design-docs impl-plans -S
